summary: DSU (disjoint-set union) with constructor, find (path compression), union, connected, and count.

tests.call: (() => { const d = new DSU(4); d.union(0,1); d.union(2,3); return d.connected(0,1) })()
(() => { const d = new DSU(4); d.union(0,1); return d.connected(0,2) })()
(() => { const d = new DSU(4); d.union(0,1); d.union(2,3); return d.count() })()
(() => { const d = new DSU(3); return d.connected(1,1) })()
(() => { const d = new DSU(5); d.union(0,1); d.union(1,2); d.union(2,3); return d.connected(0,3) })()

summary: isBipartiteGraph reports whether an undirected graph is 2-colorable (bipartite).
kruskalMstWeight returns the total weight of the minimum spanning forest using Kruskal.
primMstWeight returns the MST weight via Prim starting from node 0.
transitiveClosure returns a reachability matrix where entry [i][j] is true if j is reachable from i (a node reaches itself).
topoSortLevels groups nodes into Kahn levels (each inner array sorted ascending); returns empty outer array if graph is cyclic.
degreeSequence returns the undirected degree of each node in a graph, sorted descending.
countPathsDag returns the number of distinct paths from a source to a target in a DAG.
